description: Professional PPE compliance monitoring — Safety Eye powered by YOLOv8

panels.description: Weighted compliance score across all processed frames
panels.title: Overall Safety Score

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(AVG(compliance_rate) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Average time between consecutive violations (minutes) — higher is better
panels.title: Mean Time Between Violations

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(frame_timestamp) - MIN(frame_timestamp))) / NULLIF(COUNT(*)-1,0) / 60 AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM violations WHERE $__timeFilter(frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Minutes elapsed since the most recent violation was detected
panels.title: Time Since Last Violation

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(frame_timestamp)))/60 AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM violations WHERE (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Frames where 2 or more simultaneous violations were detected — highest risk situations
panels.title: High-Risk Frames (2+ Violations)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT session_id FROM violations WHERE $__timeFilter(frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY session_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) t

panels.description: Compliance rate change: last 12h vs previous 12h. Positive = improving, negative = declining
panels.title: Compliance Trend (vs prev 12h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST((SELECT AVG(compliance_rate) FROM detection_sessions WHERE captured_at >= NOW()-INTERVAL '12 hours' AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))) - (SELECT AVG(compliance_rate) FROM detection_sessions WHERE captured_at >= NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours' AND captured_at < NOW()-INTERVAL '12 hours' AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))) AS numeric),1),0) AS value

panels.description: Zone with the highest number of violations in the selected time range
panels.title: Worst Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(vs.location, vs.name) AS value FROM violations v JOIN video_sources vs ON vs.id = v.video_source_id WHERE $__timeFilter(v.frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR v.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY COALESCE(vs.location,vs.name) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: % of helmet detections vs total helmet-related detections
panels.title: Helmet Compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='helmet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name IN ('helmet','no_helmet') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Vest coverage: vest detections vs (vest + no-PPE detections). Proxy since no explicit no_vest class.
panels.title: Vest Coverage

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='vest' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name IN ('vest','none') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: % of glove detections vs total glove-related detections
panels.title: Gloves Compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='gloves' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name IN ('gloves','no_gloves') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: % of boot detections vs total boot-related detections
panels.title: Boots Compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='boots' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name IN ('boots','no_boots') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: % of goggle detections vs total goggle-related detections
panels.title: Goggles Compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='goggles' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name IN ('goggles','no_goggle') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: % of detections where person has absolutely NO safety gear (class: none) — most critical violation
panels.title: No PPE At All (Critical)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.class_name='none' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS numeric),1),0) AS value FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Average compliance rate across all frames in selected time range
panels.title: Avg Compliance Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(compliance_rate) AS numeric),2) AS value FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Total violations in selected time range
panels.title: Total Violations

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM violations WHERE $__timeFilter(frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Violations pending review
panels.title: Unacknowledged Violations

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM violations WHERE acknowledged=false AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Total person detections across all frames
panels.title: Total Persons Detected

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(person_count),0) AS value FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer))

panels.description: Compliance rate per frame with threshold bands at 50% and 80%
panels.title: Compliance Rate Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at AS time, compliance_rate AS "Compliance Rate %" FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) ORDER BY captured_at

panels.description: Person occupancy per frame over time — indicates worksite activity level
panels.title: Person Occupancy Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at AS time, person_count AS "Persons in Frame" FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) ORDER BY captured_at

panels.description: Violations grouped by hour of day — identify peak non-compliance windows
panels.title: Violations by Hour of Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM frame_timestamp) AS integer) AS hour_of_day, COUNT(*) AS violations FROM violations WHERE $__timeFilter(frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY CAST(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM frame_timestamp) AS integer) ORDER BY hour_of_day

panels.description: Violations aggregated per hour — reveals spikes and trends in safety incidents
panels.title: Hourly Violation Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', frame_timestamp) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Violations/hr" FROM violations WHERE $__timeFilter(frame_timestamp) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', frame_timestamp) ORDER BY time

panels.description: Count per violation type — identifies most common PPE gaps
panels.title: Violations by Type

targets.rawSql: SELECT violation_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM violations WHERE (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY violation_type ORDER BY count DESC

panels.description: High = no PPE at all (class: none), Medium = specific item missing
panels.title: Violations by Severity

targets.rawSql: SELECT severity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM violations WHERE (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY severity ORDER BY count DESC

panels.description: Violation count per camera/zone location
panels.title: Violations per Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(vs.location,vs.name) AS location, COUNT(v.id) AS violations FROM violations v JOIN video_sources vs ON vs.id=v.video_source_id WHERE (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR v.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY COALESCE(vs.location,vs.name) ORDER BY violations DESC

panels.description: Average detection confidence per class — lower confidence may indicate poor lighting or unusual angles
panels.title: Avg Confidence per Detection Class

targets.rawSql: SELECT d.class_name, ROUND(CAST(AVG(d.confidence)*100 AS numeric),1) AS avg_confidence FROM detections d JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.id=d.session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR ds.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) GROUP BY d.class_name ORDER BY avg_confidence DESC

panels.description: YOLO inference time per frame — spikes may indicate resource contention
panels.title: Inference Time Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at AS time, inference_time_ms AS "Inference (ms)" FROM detection_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) ORDER BY captured_at

panels.description: All unacknowledged violations requiring review — newest first
panels.title: Unresolved Violations (Pending Acknowledgement)

targets.rawSql: SELECT v.frame_timestamp AS "Timestamp", v.violation_type AS "Violation Type", v.severity AS "Severity", COALESCE(vs.location,vs.name) AS "Zone", vs.name AS "Video Source", CAST(v.id AS text) AS "ID" FROM violations v JOIN video_sources vs ON vs.id=v.video_source_id WHERE v.acknowledged=false AND (CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer) IS NULL OR v.video_source_id = CAST(NULLIF('${video_source}','All') AS integer)) ORDER BY v.frame_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Per-video breakdown with compliance gauge, violation counts, and processing stats
panels.title: Video Source Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT vs.name, COALESCE(vs.location,'—') AS location, vs.status, COUNT(DISTINCT ds.id) AS frames_processed, COALESCE(SUM(ds.person_count),0) AS total_persons, COALESCE(SUM(ds.violation_count),0) AS total_violations, COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(AVG(ds.compliance_rate) AS numeric),1),0) AS avg_compliance, COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(AVG(ds.inference_time_ms) AS numeric),1),0) AS avg_inference_ms, vs.processed_at FROM video_sources vs LEFT JOIN detection_sessions ds ON ds.video_source_id=vs.id GROUP BY vs.id,vs.name,vs.location,vs.status,vs.processed_at ORDER BY total_violations DESC NULLS LAST

list.definition: SELECT 'All' AS __text, 'All' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(location,name) AS __text, CAST(id AS text) AS __value FROM video_sources ORDER BY 1
list.label: Video Source
list.name: video_source
list.query: SELECT 'All' AS __text, 'All' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(location,name) AS __text, CAST(id AS text) AS __value FROM video_sources ORDER BY 1

title: Safety Eye — PPE Compliance Monitor
